landing.heroSubtitle: Your powerful AI assistant from Saigon - Hanoi Commercial Joint Stock Bank, helping you answer all questions about finance, services, and products quickly and accurately.
landing.aboutDesc: Saigon - Hanoi Commercial Joint Stock Bank (SHB) is one of the largest joint stock commercial banks in Vietnam, pioneering in digital technology and comprehensive finance.
landing.businessModelDesc: Developing a diverse customer ecosystem based on a comprehensive digital transformation platform. Providing green credit products, retail and corporate banking services.
landing.competitiveAdvantageDesc: Nationwide network and international reach, strong financial capacity, and absolute prestige with the philosophy of Dedication - Reach - Aspiration - Devotion.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Explore SHB Chatbot now for dedicated support.
landing.footerDesc: AI Chatbot system owned by HuyLee.
